name: Ruhrpumpen
message: Founded in 2000 and headquartered in Tulsa, Oklahoma, Ruhrpumpen Group designs manufactures, and supplies pump and pumping equipment. The Company produces overhung pumps, vertical pumps, hydraulic decoking systems, fire pumps, and other products.We will upload 142gb corporate data soon. SSNs of almost 600 employees and other personal information, detailed financials, projects, contracts and agreements, NDA, numerous project files and so on.
